Hero.subtitle: Track cycles, predict moods, and screen for PCOS with our intelligent assistant.

Chat.greeting: Hello! I'm your health assistant. Ask me anything about your cycle or health. 💕
Chat.error: Sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again.

chips.nextPeriodMsg: When is my next period predicted?
chips.pcodMsg: Can you explain what PCOD/PCOS is?
chips.nutritionMsg: What should I eat during my period?

Risk.title: PCOD Risk Assessment
Risk.logTwoCycles: Log at least 2 cycles to see your risk assessment.

features.title: Core Features
features.feat1Desc: Log your cycle with symptoms, mood, and flow intensity for accurate predictions.
features.feat2Desc: AI-powered cycle predictions that adapt to irregular patterns.
features.feat3Desc: Machine learning model assesses your risk based on cycle data and symptoms.

cycle.startTracking: Start tracking to see your cycle phase

onboarding.subtitle: Tell us about your last period so we can generate accurate predictions for you.

chat.title: Health Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask me anything about your cycle, symptoms, or reproductive health.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Your personalised health analytics at a glance.
insights.trendEmpty: No cycles recorded yet. Use the Track page to start your first period.
insights.symptomEmpty: No daily logs yet. Log your symptoms on the Track page or dashboard.
insights.moodEmpty: Log your mood daily to see your mood distribution here.

track.title: Cycle Tracker
track.subtitle: Log your daily symptoms and manage your cycle timeline.
track.noCycles: 💡 No cycles recorded yet. Click "🔴 Start Period Today" to begin tracking your first cycle. Saving daily logs separately will not create a cycle record.

footer.copyright: © 2025 HerCycle AI. Built with 💕 for women's health tech.

recommendations.consult: Consider consulting with a healthcare provider for detailed assessment.
recommendations.keepTracking: Keep tracking your cycle and maintaining healthy habits.

Community.title: Anonymous Community
Community.subtitle: A safe, anonymous space to discuss PCOD, cycle tracking, and mental health.
Community.be_the_first: Be the first to start a discussion!
Community.safe_space_desc: Your identity is protected. All posts and comments are strictly moderated by AI to ensure a supportive environment for everyone.
Community.no_posts_category: No posts in this category yet. Start the conversation!
Community.title_placeholder: What do you want to discuss?
Community.content_placeholder: Share your thoughts, experiences, or questions anonymously...
Community.moderation_notice: This community is strictly moderated by AI. Please be kind and respectful.
Community.no_comments: No comments yet. Be the first to share!
Community.cat_pcod-advice_desc: Share tips and ask questions about managing PCOD.
Community.cat_cycle-tracking_desc: Discuss period tracking, ovulation, and cycle irregularities.
Community.cat_mental-health_desc: A safe space to talk about emotional well-being and stress.
Community.cat_general-discussion_desc: Talk about anything else related to women's health.

PartnerSharing.title: Partner Sharing
PartnerSharing.desc: Share your cycle insights with a partner. You control exactly what they can see.
PartnerSharing.showMoodDesc: Allow partner to see your logged mood
PartnerSharing.showSymptomsDesc: Allow partner to see logged symptoms
PartnerSharing.showFertileDesc: Allow partner to see fertile predictions
PartnerSharing.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect this partner? They will lose access immediately.

PrivacyData.title: Privacy & Data
PrivacyData.exportDesc: Download a copy of all your health data, including cycle logs and predictions, in JSON and CSV formats.
PrivacyData.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data from our servers. This will immediately trigger a hard wipe of your cycles, logs, and profile. This action is irreversible.
PrivacyData.deleteConfirm: WARNING: This will permanently delete your account, including all cycle logs, predictions, and profile data. This action CANNOT be undone. Are you sure you want to proceed?

CycleEducation.title: Discover your current cycle phase
CycleEducation.desc: Log the start date of your latest period to receive phase-based educational information and self-care guidance.

WeightTracker.title: Weight Tracker
WeightTracker.desc: Record weight and waist measurements to understand gradual changes over time.
WeightTracker.disclaimer: BMI is a general screening measure and is not a diagnosis. Health changes should be discussed with a qualified healthcare professional.
WeightTracker.trendDesc: Measurements are shown in chronological order.
WeightTracker.noMeasurements: No measurements yet. Add the first entry from the Track page.

CervicalDischarge.title: Cervical Discharge
CervicalDischarge.disclaimer: Your selection will be saved with today's Daily Log.
CervicalDischarge.insightDisclaimer: Educational information only. This is not medical advice.

insights.none: No discharge is also a normal variation during some phases of the menstrual cycle.
insights.sticky: Sticky discharge is commonly observed after menstruation.
insights.creamy: Creamy discharge is often seen before ovulation.
insights.watery: Watery discharge commonly occurs around the fertile window.
insights.egg-white: Egg-white discharge is commonly associated with peak fertility.

SelfCare.title: Self Care
SelfCare.greatJob: Great job taking time for yourself today.
